stemHtml: A transport aircraft has to carry some heavy cargo aft of the CG location. The cargo would ideally be placed further forwards within the aircraft, but it is very difficult to move. The Captain verifies that the aircraft is within CG limits currently, and continues with the flight preparation. What is the effect on stick force stability and how does the leading edge of the variable-incidence horizontal stabiliser move due to this cargo?

options.a: Stick force stability is increased and the stabiliser leading edge moves down.
options.b: Stick force stability is increased and the stabiliser leading edge moves up.
options.c: Stick force stability is decreased and the stabiliser leading edge moves up.
options.d: Stick force stability is decreased and the stabiliser leading edge moves down.
